data.title: Ademi Firm probes if RAPT Therapeutics is giving a fair price to shareholders in deal with GSK plc.
data.description: Ademi LLP is currently conducting an investigation into RAPT (NASDAQ: RAPT) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations related to its recent agreement with GSK plc. The probe aims to assess the situation thoroughly. To participate in the investigation and access more information, individuals are encouraged to visit the provided link.

data.title: RainFocus introduces RainFocus Nexus - a secure, cloud-agnostic system of specialized AI agents to assist event marketers.
data.description: In LEHI, Utah, on January 20, 2026, RainFocus™, a leader in event marketing platforms, introduced AI agents aimed at assisting in decision-making, managing intricate setups, and ensuring compatibility with current enterprise systems. These intelligent agents aim to enhance efficiency in organizations and offer adaptable solutions.

data.title: Marksman Titan Security Group acquires Priebe Security Services in Central Texas, expanding presence, elevating service excellence.
data.description: Austin, Texas - On January 20, 2026, Marksman Security Services, LLC, a subsidiary of the Marksman Titan Security Group, a prominent national security services company in the United States, has successfully acquired Priebe Security Services. This acquisition marks a significant step in the growth of Marksman Titan Security Group and enhances their position in the industry.

data.title: Learn about closed-end funds on Closed-End Corner on Gabelli TV and YouTube. Visit for investment education.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Rye, New York, an invitation was extended to investors interested in exploring closed-end funds, a frequently neglected asset class. This opportunity can be accessed through The Closed-End Corner on Gabelli TV and YouTube, providing valuable insights and information for interested parties.

data.title: Opender Singh, CFA, a Wall Street veteran, leaves to build AI-native Web3 markets; joins ANDX Global as Co-Founder & COO.
data.description: Opender Singh, a highly experienced executive with a background in finance, recently made a significant leadership transition in the digital finance industry in 2026. Singh, who holds the Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation, has held senior positions at major financial institutions including UBS, Credit Suisse, Deutsche Bank, Société Générale, Merrill Lynch, and BlackRock. His departure from Wall Street marks a significant change in the industry landscape.

data.title: Micron confirms 100% sell-through to AI leaders due to chip shortage, diverting production from consumer goods.市 MU stock rising.
data.description: Last Friday, Micron Technology, Inc. Executive VP Manish Bhatia disclosed that the surge in AI infrastructure has led to an unparalleled scarcity of memory chips. Production capacity is being redirected from everyday consumer products to meet the demands of AI giants. This trend in AI development is causing a significant impact on the global electronics market, creating a zero-sum game scenario. Consequently, Micron's stock (NASDAQ: MU) is on the rise. Micron's focus on catering to lead players in AI like Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) is contributing to this shift in priorities within the company. For more details, visit the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fifth Third Bancorp beats Q4 earnings expectations, reports PPNR of $1.08 billion; Analyst sets $365 price target.
data.description: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) surpassed expectations with their fourth-quarter earnings report, attributing this success to a slightly higher pre-provision net revenue (PPNR) and a reduced provision. Analyst Ryan Nash from Goldman Sachs, who reiterated a Buy rating for the company, set a $365 price target. The bank reported a PPNR of $1.08 billion, exceeding the consensus of $1.07 billion, notably due to increased fees, particularly in commercial payments and capital markets revenue. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gradient Toxicologist Lindsey Borton is a finalist for 2026 Lush Prize supporting alternatives to animal-based testing.
data.description: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Lindsey Borton, a Principal Toxicologist at Gradient, and Kelly Coleman, a scientist at Medtronic, have been selected as finalists for the prestigious Lush Prize in 2026. This award is dedicated to promoting non-animal testing methods within the scientific community. The recognition was made public on January 20, 2026, in Boston. Lindsey Borton's groundbreaking work has garnered attention in the field, highlighting the importance of advancing alternative testing approaches. Kelly Coleman's contributions at Medtronic also align with the ethos of the Lush Prize, which champions innovative techniques that reduce reliance on animal testing. The finalists showcase the commitment of these scientists to pushing boundaries and driving progress towards more ethical and effective research practices.

data.title: Cadence launches Estate Guard™ to protect assets post-death, helping families manage financial and digital accounts securely.
data.description: In Saskatchewan, a Canadian tech company called Cadence has introduced Estate Guard™, a specialized estate protection feature for the funeral and estate industry. This tool aids families in promptly identifying active financial and digital accounts of deceased individuals, reducing the risk of post-loss identity fraud. The technology is crucial in addressing this pressing concern impacting millions globally. Cadence's Estate Guard™ is designed to revolutionize how families and institutions handle post-loss matters and aims to mitigate potential risks associated with unresolved financial and digital accounts.

data.title: Global Electric Vehicle HVAC market valued at US$5.9 Billion in 2024, projected to reach US$9.8 Billion by 2030, growing at 8.8% CAGR. Comprehensive report available.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the Electric Vehicle HVAC market has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It highlights that the sector was worth US$5.9 billion in 2024 and is estimated to climb to US$9.8 billion by 2030, indicating a 8.8% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) during the period from 2024 to 2030. The detailed analysis in the report covers market trends, influential factors, and future projections to assist in making well-informed business choices. This growth reflects the increasing adoption of electric vehicles.

data.title: Vitrolife Group to present Q4 and full year report 2025 on Feb 3, 2026 at 08:00 am CET, with an investor conference call at 10:00 am CET.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, Vitrolife AB (publ) is set to release its 2025 fourth quarter and full year report on February 3, 2026, at 08:00 am CET. An accompanying conference call will take place at 10:00 am CET on the same day, intended for investors, analysts, and financial media participants.

data.title: Arora Engineers acquires J.A. Watts, LLC, expanding aviation solutions; JWI is a program and construction management firm.
data.description: Arora Engineers, a leading infrastructure solutions company, recently acquired J.A. Watts, LLC (JWI), a program and construction management firm headquartered in Chicago with multiple offices throughout North America. The acquisition was made public on January 20, 2026, aided by support from Jacmel Partners. Arora, supported by Jacmel Partners, operates on a global scale and this strategic move enhances their presence in the industry.

data.title: Estuary Power completed Escape Solar and Storage project, now supplying 185MW of solar energy and 400MWh of battery to MGM Resorts.
data.description: In January 20, 2026, Estuary Power announced the successful completion of its Escape Solar and Storage project in Lincoln County, Nevada. The project, finalized in December 2025, is now providing 185 MW of solar energy and features a storage capacity of 400 MWh.
